rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PATRICIA A MCCARTHY
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Approval Of Settlement Of Will Contest
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Rizza Madjus has signed the settlement agreement on behalf of David Competente, as the designated proposed custodian under CUTMA. It is unclear whether a proposed custodian under CUTMA has the ability to represent a minor in a proceeding. 2) The settlement agreement directs that $20,000 be distributed to the will contestants upon Petitioners' appointment. The distribution would not be subject to creditor's claims or expenses of administration, and appears more like a preliminary distribution, which would be subject to the timing restrictions under the Probate Code. 3) The Settlement Agreement requires that the court retain jurisdiction, but no request to retain jurisdiction has been made.
